_comment: Committed per release. Source of truth for first-run provisioning artifacts (vm-provisioning-lifecycle.provision.first-run-downloads@v1). The headless crate version is a build version, not a release tag, so the binary URL/tag are pinned here explicitly.

rootfs._note: OCI image archive, NOT a flat rootfs. WslRuntime::provision must flatten the layer(s) into a rootfs tar before `wsl --import` (see Phase 2b).
